properties.name: Bonny Island LNG
properties.description: 1er hub LNG africain (22 Mtpa). NLNG Ltd (Shell/Total/Eni/NNPC). Exports Asie/Europe.

properties.name: Port Harcourt / Bonny Oil
properties.description: Terminal export brut Bonny Light. Zone d'insurrection Niger Delta (MEND).

properties.name: Forcados Terminal
properties.description: Terminal export brut Forcados. Operator Shell. Attaques MEND historiques.

properties.name: Escravos Terminal
properties.description: Terminal Chevron. Export brut + GTL. Zone d'incidents securitaires.

properties.name: Soyo LNG (Angola LNG)
properties.description: Terminal LNG du delta du Congo. 5.2 Mtpa. Chevron/Sonangol/BP/Eni/Total.

properties.name: Cabinda Oil Terminal
properties.description: Principal terminal Angola. Enclave Cabinda, insurrection FLEC active mais basse intensite.

properties.name: Ain Sukhna
properties.description: Terminal du SuMed Pipeline (Red Sea - Alexandrie). Alternative au Canal de Suez.

properties.name: Sidi Kerir
properties.description: Terminal ouest du SuMed. Raffinerie MIDOR + exports Mediterranee.

properties.name: Arzew GL1Z/GL2Z
properties.description: Principal complexe LNG algerien. Export Sonatrach vers Europe.

properties.name: Skikda LNG
properties.description: Complexe LNG + raffinerie Skikda. Export brut et GNL vers Europe.

properties.name: Bejaia
properties.description: Terminal petrolier HH-BRN sur la cote kabyle. Transit brut Hassi Messaoud.

properties.name: Skhira
properties.description: Terminal petrolier ETAP/Sonatrach pipeline transtunisien. Export brut algerien.

properties.name: Marsa el-Brega
properties.description: Terminal LNG + raffinerie. Cible conflits GNA/LNA recurrents.

properties.name: Ras Lanuf
properties.description: Principal hub petrolier libyen. Occupe/libere x fois (Haftar vs GNA) 2017-2024.

properties.name: Es Sider
properties.description: Terminal export brut libyen. Cote cyrenaique.

properties.name: Cabo Delgado LNG (Afungi)
properties.description: Projet TotalEnergies 20 Mtpa, suspendu depuis attaque ISIS-Moz Palma mars 2021. Reprise 2025.

properties.name: KPRL Mombasa
properties.description: Kenya Petroleum Refineries. Raffinerie convertie en storage. Import hub Afrique Est.

properties.name: Bioko / Punta Europa LNG
properties.description: Complexe LNG + methanol. Marathon Oil (US). Exports Europe/Amerique latine.
